title: BUG #17669: Invalid TOAST pointer in PL/pgSQL variable
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t_seed_17669 (a INT, b TEXT);
CREATE FUNCTION f_seed_17669() RETURNS TEXT BEGIN DECLARE s TEXT;
SELECT b INTO s FROM t_seed_17669 WHERE a = 1;
key_bug_features: Invalid TOAST pointer in PL/pgSQL variable handling
